epic.priority: bdo's arc, named 2026-06-19 ('Just epic.diagram') in the working session that located the existing diagram-author skill (Desktop/SubProtocol/vault/skills/diagram-author + _theme/svg/compose.py) and resolved to port it INTO ontum 'turned up to 11'. It is a COMPOSING arc, not a from-scratch build: it ports a real, tested renderer and reuses ontum organs that already exist (authoring.js, term_economy.py, the value-gate/§10 discipline, the causality Pattern Commons) and refuses to double-build any of them (§10). Awaits bdo's confirm-arc before the pieces are carried.
epic.arc: ontum gains a first-class diagramming ORGAN: a governed surface that captures subject-matter intent and renders honest architecture diagrams. The port is shaped by the membrane architecture this session designed — the diagrammer is built AS that architecture: a generative pole (describe/gesture + bounded inference) feeds an ingress GATE with teeth (the diagramming canon, refusing), which gates a deterministic body (compose.py: spec -> SVG, the fold), standing on truth (the repo, in projection mode). The horizon is not a prettier drawing tool: it is a shape-transfer instrument whose diagrams carry an SME's intent faithfully and can REFUSE a dishonest picture with a cited reason — the thing draw.io structurally cannot be.
epic.context: Three things this arc must hold, each a correction the repo's own second-set-of-eyes (D-2) made when this design was reviewed on 2026-06-19 by three independent reviewers citing real files: (1) THE SME IS A NAMED CANON, NOT THE data-visualizer. The data-visualizer advisor is the *charts* canon (it ranks encodings of MAGNITUDE) and is an advisory persona pointed at a substrate (ontogrammatic/html_design_tokens.py) that resolves nowhere on disk; an architecture diagram encodes CONNECTION and TYPE, no magnitude. The governing SME must be the architecture-diagramming canon, named: Moody's *The Physics of Notations* (semiotic clarity, perceptual discriminability, semantic transparency, complexity management, cognitive integration, visual expressiveness, dual coding, graphic economy, cognitive fit), graph-drawing aesthetics (Purchase's empirical crossing studies; Battista/Eades/Tamassia), and C4 (Simon Brown) for the containment/zoom genres. The data-visualizer is demoted to a SUB-advisor, summoned only for genuinely quantitative genres (e.g. sankey). (2) AUTO-LAYOUT IS NOT AN EXTENSION — IT IS REFUSED. compose.py is explicit-position BY DESIGN (taste.md refuses auto-layout: 'produces unpredictable diffs when one node is added'), which protects diff-stability — ontum's byte-deterministic grain. The arc adds at most a deterministic layout AID (tier-declaration -> grid-snap: you declare rank, the tool does the arithmetic), never a constraint solver / orthogonal router. (3) DO NOT DOUBLE-BUILD. New module diagrams/ sibling to causality/ — never an extension of causality/canvas.js (would break the live causality preset). Reuse the schema-driven DISCIPLINE, not the artifact. Any diagram-from-truth projection folds INTO causality/term_economy.py, never a parallel diagram_economy.py. Consult the live causality/patterns/pattern-commons.v1.json (53 patterns), do not invent. THE LOAD-BEARING GOOD IDEA, all three reviewers agreed: the 'taste gate with teeth that REFUSES' — and it half-exists already (qa.py exits 1, detects edge-through-node via Liang-Barsky). The whole arc is the smallest honest path from that to a governed organ.
epic.value: A diagram in ontum becomes an act on the record, not a drawing: it carries whose intent it serves, which canon governed it, and what it refused — and a picture that lies (orphan node, untraceable hub, invented notation, edge through an unrelated node) is refused with a cited 'why' the same way the off-log gate and mock-shame refuse. The architecture this conversation kept iterating stops going stale, because in projection mode the diagram is a fold over the repo, never a second source of truth. And the SME-intent loop (describe -> render -> the SME confirms the picture carries what they meant) makes the diagrammer a shape-transfer instrument, the visual form of the design-conversation discipline.
epic.horizon: Done at epic scale: ontum has diagrams/ with a deterministic compose.py spec->SVG floor; a refusing gate (qa.py promoted to the ontum hook grain) whose every refusal cites the named canon; one layout aid (tier-declaration grid-snap) that keeps diffs stable; generative authoring (describe -> schema-valid diagram spec, validated before render, reusing the authoring.js pattern); projection-from-truth folded into term_economy; recursive zoom for complexity; the causality look served live; and a governed, growing diagram Pattern-Commons family. A genre is added only when two real diagrams refuse to fit the existing ones (the §10 test) — never to fill a zoo. The first increment proves the gate-with-teeth + named canon + one genre on a real ontum content shape, requiring none of the rest.

pieces.status: wave 1 — the deterministic floor; ported once
pieces.glue: Port compose.py + _theme (palette, the seven node types, two-accent rule) from Desktop/SubProtocol/vault into diagrams/ as a stdlib-only, deterministic spec->SVG renderer (ontum's local-first, no-network grain). Keep it EXPLICIT-POSITION (taste.md's deliberate choice for diff-stability). Reuse the schema-driven discipline of causality/canvas.js (one SCHEMA drives defaults + inspector + serialization) but author a diagram-specific SCHEMA — do NOT extend canvas.js (§10: would break the causality preset). Acceptance: a committed diagram spec renders byte-deterministically to the same SVG on every run.

One reference file naming the architecture-diagramming canon as the governing SME: Moody's *The Physics of Notations* (esp. semantic transparency, graphic economy, complexity management), graph-drawing aesthetics (Purchase: minimize crossings/bends; maximize symmetry), and C4 for containment/zoom. Each principle maps to a checkable rule the gate can cite. The data-visualizer advisor is recorded here as a SUB-advisor for quantitative genres only, not the governor (the repo's correction). This is the SME-intent spine: every refusal points at a named principle, never taste-by-assertion.

pieces.status: wave 1 — the load-bearing piece: a gate with teeth
pieces.glue: Promote qa.py from a checklist-runner to a REFUSING gate in the ontum hook grain (deny = nonzero + reason on stderr, fail-open on its own error, like the off-log gate / mock-shame). Teeth, each citing atom.diagram-canon.v0: not-one-of-the-N-types -> deny (semiotic clarity); >2 accents -> deny; orphan node -> deny; node untraceable-to-a-hub in <=4 hops -> deny (cognitive load); edge through an unrelated node -> deny (the existing Liang-Barsky check); >8 siblings in a row -> deny-with-'split' (graphic economy); invented shape/genre -> deny (semantic transparency). The §10 test applied to pictures: two locally-fine diagrams that refuse to fit are caught here.

pieces.status: wave 1 — the one honest layout aid
pieces.glue: Tier-declaration -> deterministic grid-snap: a node declares a tier and an order; the tool computes x/y from the declared column step + margin. This is rank/layer assignment at its honest floor — you declare the rank, the tool does the arithmetic — and diffs stay stable (add a node -> only its column shifts). Explicitly NOT a constraint solver, NOT orthogonal edge routing (taste.md refuses auto-layout; the repo priced full layout as a large net-new subsystem against the existing grain). Gutter-suggestion (the gate proposes the nearest named waypoint for a flagged edge) may ride here; full Sugiyama/ELK-style routing is deferred and, if ever needed, reaches for a named offline dependency rather than a hand-roll.

pieces.status: wave 1 — one genre, on a proven content shape
pieces.glue: Ship exactly ONE new genre whose ontum content shape genuinely refuses the flat node-graph: the pipeline STATE MACHINE (value-gate -> owner-stamp -> placement -> handoff -> confirm, from reconcile.py PIPELINE) OR the summon->judge->receipt SEQUENCE. Carries the mandatory 'what is deliberately not shown' caption (taste.md / qc-checklist deliverable rule). Proves the floor + canon + gate + grid-snap end to end on one real diagram. Earned genres beyond this are added only when two real diagrams refuse to fit (§10) — the membrane cross-section is explicitly NOT a genre (invented notation, refused by graphic economy / semantic transparency); it stands as a one-off authored diagram only.

Generative authoring: describe/gesture -> bounded inference -> a schema-valid diagram spec -> validated BEFORE render. Reuse causality/authoring.js's pattern directly (validateSpec is schema-agnostic and tested — refuses 6 malformed specs; this was the one reuse the repo verified clean), feeding it the diagram SCHEMA and a diagram-vocabulary prompt. Natural language is never truth: it produces a typed draft the gate (atom.diagram-gate.v0) still judges. Closes the shape-transfer loop with a confirm step (the SME verifies the rendered picture carries their intent — the R7 comprehension discipline, visual).

Point the organ at the repo: a diagram becomes a FOLD over real evidence (module/membrane structure, pipeline, log spans), so the architecture diagram regenerates from truth and cannot drift. DO NOT build a parallel diagram_economy.py (§10): fold the diagram projection INTO causality/term_economy.py as a classified projection of a term/relationship graph, resolving every node/edge against committed bytes and refusing what does not resolve (term_economy's existing grip teeth). Acceptance: given a fixed repo state, a deterministic diagram spec with stable ids; a citation that resolves nowhere is refused, not drawn.

Recursive zoom (a node expands into its own gated sub-diagram, each level with its 'what is not shown' caption — Moody's complexity-management + cognitive-integration; the mechanized form of taste's 'split into one diagram per shape, linked in prose'). The causality look-and-feel (cream paper, hand-drawn marker, anima) as a reskin of the renderer, served live. A governed, growing diagram family in causality/patterns/pattern-commons.v1.json (consult first, deposit exemplars; the experience skill's ritual, not its external foundry commons). The experience layer is skin + surface, never counted as diagramming rigor — the rigor stays in the gate.
